101104.PreviewText: ◆Make you the fashion icon of Asterleeds!

104200.PreviewText: ◆Use talents to grow stronger and define your unique combat style.

100804.PreviewText:
◆Follow the manual to track down bosses and elites.
Obtain rare materials & titles!

200501.PreviewText:
◆Tactical skill sets.
Use strategies to crush any foe!

800500.PreviewText:
◆Complete Season Pass for achievements.
Unlock emblems and items!

810024.PreviewText: Complete Battle Pass Quests and Achievements to raise your Season Title and earn Emblems. More fun modes, generous rewards, and a points shop are waiting for you. Clean it out!

800521.PreviewText: Activate Mind Projection to unlock your exclusive seasonal effects.

500100.PreviewText: ◆Join a Guild to find like-minded partners.

800400.PreviewText:
◆Buy and sell resources.
Savvy businessman can make profits out of it.

810009.PreviewText: ◆Boarlet is ready to go with you. Complete the main story quest to obtain Boarlet mount and explore the world!

300205.PreviewText:
◆Located on the first floor of the device.
Repeatable gear farming, easier with teammates.

300000.PreviewText: ◆Grab your fishing pole and catch all kinds of fish. Become the next fishing master!

501000.PreviewText: ◆You will always find a Life Skill that interests you.

200301.PreviewText:
◆Gain creature abilities.
Explore terrain freely with wolf sprint and eagle glide!

300301.PreviewText:
◆Complete Attack, Guardian, and Support trials.
Unlock talents and claim rewards!

300206.PreviewText:
◆Deadlier realms. Greater rewards.
Team up and conquer the unknown!

500888.PreviewText: ◆The mysterious Inverted Spire, facing stronger enemies and more threatening scenes on each floor.

300105.PreviewText:
◆Explore deadly ruins.
Uncover the secrets of the Asterleeds War.

100709.PreviewText: ◆Refine attributes strategically to break power ceilings!

100710.PreviewText: ◆Embed suitable gems to enhance your gear effects!

102500.PreviewText: ◆Create a Homestead of your own! (Complete main quest [Luno Loop] and reach Lv.40 to unlock.)

800506.PreviewText: ◆Upgrade your Emblem and enhance your combat capabilities for this season!

810004.PreviewText: ◆Enter the mysterious ruins of Bapharian, collaborate in two dimensions, and defeat the guardian statues in the ruins!

810005.PreviewText: ◆Confront the power of ancient souls and defeat the former Kanamia warriors!

810006.PreviewText: ◆Enter the deep canyon that looks like it was fiercely clawed by a dragon, and battle dragons in the storm!

810008.PreviewText: Seek the light in the darkness, and find the only path in the light! Win random drops of all parts, plus exclusive weapon skins!

810001.PreviewText: ◆Beneath the most treacherous waters of Asterleeds lies a bizarre large cavity.

810002.PreviewText: ◆A valley occupied by Muku and Goblins, with relatively rich mineral resources within.

810027.PreviewText: The Winter Dragon, master of ice, awaits in the "Dragon Shackles" raid. During battle, the team should stay alert to the negative impacts brought by severe weather changes. Fight now to earn generous rewards!

810007.PreviewText: ◆Survive the hazardous unknown and finish the timed survey to earn high-value gear and materials!

104210.PreviewText: ◆Activate combat modifiers to enhance your combat capabilities!

810003.PreviewText: ◆A wild forest beyond the Asteria Plains, teeming with creatures rarely seen by humans.

810028.PreviewText: The Void Remnant Dragon sealed within the "Dragon Shackles" raid rises again in power. Players must contend with the colossal beast and navigate the threats emerging from the divine seal. Fight now to earn generous rewards!

810029.PreviewText: The Daylight Dragon, master of time, awaits in the "Dragon Shackles" raid. Seek safety in the rifts of light and shadow before seizing the moment to strike. Fight now to earn generous rewards!

810014.PreviewText: Venture deep into the ominous land. Beware of deceptive visions and purge the slumbering nightmares! Earn gauntlet and earring drops, along with exclusive appearances!

810015.PreviewText: Explore the abandoned mine where colossal beasts lurk; race death through collapsing tunnels! Earn helmet and necklace drops, along with exclusive appearances!

810016.PreviewText: Carry the sins of the past and guide the lost spirits to rest. Complete this long-overdue rite of atonement! Earn armor and ring drops, along with exclusive appearances!

810017.PreviewText: Ancient ruins hidden in the mountains are said to hold unknown treasures—and deadly guardians. Earn bracelet drops, along with exclusive appearances!

810018.PreviewText: In the underground vaults where void-corrupted souls are bound, even light cannot escape. Earn boots and charm drops, along with exclusive appearances!

810019.PreviewText: To rescue the Cabbage Mission Team, you venture into a mysterious wilderness, where the towering Illusory Bloom seems especially suspicious. Earn weapon drops along with exclusive appearances!

810020.PreviewText: In the Dreambloom Ruins raid, creatures afflicted by the Illusory Plague no longer belong among their own kind. Within the Caprahorn herd, the old king and the new king clash for dominance. Participate to earn generous rewards!

810023.PreviewText: Survive the hazardous unknown and finish the timed spatial investigation to earn high-value gear and materials!

810025.PreviewText: Xeno Engram has transformed this hunting sanctuary, trees swaying with its breath, beastly eyes glimmering as its gaze. The eerie glow from the Needle Rocks warns every intruder: there is nowhere to hide.

810026.PreviewText: In the forests around the Bahamar Highlands lies a twisted labyrinth of forgotten ruins. Its builders are long gone; now the canopy blots out the sky, monsters lurk within, and even starlight is led astray.

302000.PreviewText: To combat the highlands' Illusory Plague, researchers extracted energy from Illusory Blooms and created Slumberdream Valley—a testing ground where uncontrollable illusion power has made everything unpredictable.
